title: cyclogramma khasiensis
intro: Cyclogramma khasiensis, also known as Himalayan button fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The cyclogramma khasiensis is believed to offer relief from various health issues, such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, cyclogramma khasiensis is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or powder, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
